name: doc-guardian
description: Search docs, monitor code quality in real-time, and chat while coding.

docGuardian.firecrawlApiKey.markdownDescription: Firecrawl API key used for docs search.

docGuardian.openAIApiKey.markdownDescription: Optional OpenAI API key for richer answers. If empty, answers are generated with local heuristics.

docGuardian.openAIModel.markdownDescription: OpenAI model used by the assistant.

docGuardian.elevenLabsApiKey.markdownDescription: Optional override for ElevenLabs API key used for voice playback.

docGuardian.elevenLabsVoiceId.markdownDescription: ElevenLabs voice ID for assistant speech output.

docGuardian.elevenLabsAgentId.markdownDescription: Optional ElevenLabs agent id reference for future voice-agent workflows.

docGuardian.autoSpeakResponses.markdownDescription: Automatically speak assistant responses using ElevenLabs voice output.

docGuardian.enableLiveMonitoring.markdownDescription: Enable real-time code monitoring and alerts.

docGuardian.showPopupsForAlerts.markdownDescription: Show VS Code popup alerts for high-confidence findings.

docGuardian.enableBackgroundDocWatch.markdownDescription: Automatically monitor active file issues and fetch related docs in the background.

docGuardian.backgroundDocWatchDebounceMs.markdownDescription: Debounce delay before background docs checks run on the active file.

docGuardian.backgroundDocWatchMinInterva.markdownDescription: Minimum interval between background docs alerts for the same issue signature.

docGuardian.enableWorkspaceBackgroundDoc.markdownDescription: Enable low-priority background docs monitoring for changed files across the workspace.

docGuardian.workspaceBackgroundDocWatchD.markdownDescription: Debounce delay for workspace-wide changed-file docs checks.

docGuardian.workspaceBackgroundDocWatchM.markdownDescription: Minimum interval between repeated workspace background alerts for the same issue signature.
